---
name: Release
about: Use this template for release or version bump PRs
---

## Release Summary
Describe the release contents and the version being published.

## Changelog
Include a short changelog or link to release notes.

## Deployment
Describe deployment steps, tags, and any post-release validations.

## Checklist
- [ ] Version and changelog updated
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Deployment steps documented
